summary: Both hydrated open issues are marked security-sensitive in the preflight artifact and involve cloud invite/auth/relay surfaces. No close, label, merge, or fix action is planned; both items should be routed to central OpenClaw security/product handling.

actions.reason: The issue proposes cloud-backed pairing/discovery behavior touching Gateway connection and trust semantics, so it is out of scope for ProjectClownfish cleanup and should be routed to central OpenClaw security handling.
The issue proposes OAuth-backed cloud relay ingress and remote mobile access to the Gateway, which is security-sensitive and belongs in central OpenClaw security handling rather than dedupe cleanup.
